            <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/team> ?team ;
            <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/birthDate> ?birthDate .
    ?team <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/league> <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Premier_League> .
} 
ORDER BY ASC(?birthDate) 
LIMIT 1
gold_query: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX res: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { ?uri dbo:team ?team . ?league dbo:league res:Premier_League . ?league dbo:team ?team . ?uri dbo:birthDate ?date } ORDER BY DESC(?date) LIMIT 1

question: What were the names of the three ships by Columbus?
